name: Aeon Stone (Olivine Pendeloque)
description:
An olivine pendeloque aeon stone imparts the calmness of still earth and a solidity of thought, granting you a +3 item bonus to saving throws against effects that cause the Confused, Frightened, or Stupefied conditions.

Activate—Still Earth (Reaction) (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You become confused, frightened, or stupefied

Effect The stone suppresses the triggering effect for 1 minute, but the calming urges impose a –1 status penalty to your attack rolls.
